substances.name: Epoprostenol
substances.summary: 依前列醇（Epoprostenol）的临床药理、监测和时间进程资料索引。

contraindications: Congestive heart failure due to severe left ventricular systolic dysfunction
majorWarnings: Abrupt withdrawal can cause rebound pulmonary hypertension
majorInteractions: Antiplatelet or anticoagulant therapy may increase bleeding risk

sourceRefs.title: DailyMed VELETRI label
sourceRefs.labelSection: 2 Dosage and Administration; 5 Warnings and Precautions; 12.3 Pharmacokinetics

eliminationHalfLife.note: Human in-vivo half-life is expected to be no greater than 6 minutes.

notes: Continuous delivery is required; interruption can produce rapid clinical deterioration.
The concentration curve is governed by infusion delivery and very rapid degradation.

sourceRefs.title: DailyMed VELETRI label
sourceRefs.labelSection: 2 Dosage and Administration; 5 Warnings and Precautions; 12.3 Pharmacokinetics

tdm.monitoringType: clinical and laboratory monitoring rather than routine plasma concentration
tdm.reason: Routine management is based on clinical response and safety monitoring rather than plasma drug concentration.
interpretationCaveats: Pharmacokinetic parameters belong in timeCourse and are not therapeutic concentration targets.

sourceRefs.title: DailyMed VELETRI label
sourceRefs.labelSection: 2 Dosage and Administration; 5 Warnings and Precautions; 12.3 Pharmacokinetics

doseUseReferences.indication: PAH continuous-infusion initiation in the cited label
doseUseReferences.population: Adults unless otherwise specified by the cited label
doseUseReferences.amountText: 2 ng/kg/min initial infusion rate in the cited label
doseUseReferences.scheduleText: Continuous IV infusion with protocol-driven titration

sourceRefs.labelSection: 2 Dosage and Administration; 5 Warnings and Precautions; 12.3 Pharmacokinetics

substances.name: Iloprost
substances.summary: 伊洛前列素（Iloprost）的临床药理、监测和时间进程资料索引。

majorWarnings: Pulmonary edema in pulmonary veno-occlusive disease
majorInteractions: Antihypertensives and vasodilators may increase hypotension
Anticoagulants or antiplatelets may increase bleeding risk

sourceRefs.title: FDA Ventavis iloprost inhalation label
sourceRefs.labelSection: 2 Dosage and Administration; 5 Warnings and Precautions; 12.3 Pharmacokinetics

notes: Inhaled dosing produces route-specific short pulmonary exposure; the entry intentionally does not infer duration from intravenous half-life.

sourceRefs.title: FDA Ventavis iloprost inhalation label
sourceRefs.labelSection: 2 Dosage and Administration; 5 Warnings and Precautions; 12.3 Pharmacokinetics

doseUseReferences.amountText: 2.5-5 mcg per inhaled dose in the cited label
doseUseReferences.scheduleText: 6-9 inhalations during waking hours, at least 2 hours apart

substances.name: Treprostinil
substances.summary: 曲前列尼尔（Treprostinil）的临床药理、监测和时间进程资料索引。

contraindications: Product-specific contraindications depend on route and formulation
majorWarnings: Bloodstream infection risk with chronic IV infusion
majorInteractions: CYP2C8 inhibitors may increase exposure for applicable formulations

notes: This time course represents continuous SC/IV Remodulin and must not be applied to inhaled or oral treprostinil formulations.

substances.name: Selexipag
substances.summary: 司来帕格（Selexipag）的临床药理、监测和时间进程资料索引。

majorWarnings: Pulmonary edema in pulmonary veno-occlusive disease
majorInteractions: Moderate CYP2C8 inhibitors require regimen adjustment
monitoring: Headache, flushing, jaw pain, gastrointestinal effects
